query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_imóveis,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_dteNewListing,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_dteTermination,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_ambas_datas
FROM properfyProperties;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_dteNewListing,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_dteTermination,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_ambas_datas
FROM properfyProperties;
